items.headline: MiSTer Companion v4.0.0 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v4.0.0 is now available.

This is a major update with a complete UI overhaul, Offline Mode, improved performance, an update checker, a RetroAchievements viewer, expanded MiSTer Settings features, and many more improvements than can reasonably fit in this news update.

Important: Pico-8 and OpenBOR have been removed from the Extras tab in v4.0.0 because they have moved to MiSTer Frontier and their installation behavior has changed. If you currently installed Pico-8 or OpenBOR through the Extras tab, please remove them before upgrading to MiSTer Companion v4.0.0.

After upgrading, Pico-8 and OpenBOR can be installed again by enabling the MiSTer Frontier source in the update_all configuration.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
